control_contract.direction_flip: same events/times/exposure; gross direction and intratrade excursion are inverted while original costs are retained
control_contract.direction_permutation: same signal times, session counts, holding and long/short count within each session; directions rotate deterministically
control_contract.timing_grid: same session/event count/direction sequence/holding; entries use a deterministic non-overlapping 60-minute session grid

evaluation_contract.overlap_warning: Rolling starts are dependent development diagnostics; no confirmation or authoritative promotion is claimed.
